goal: Build a 3-lane color sorter: a Franka arm picks cubes from an infeed conveyor and routes them to one of three destination bins (RedBin, GreenBin, BlueBin) based on cube color. Nine cubes arrive in a repeating red/green/blue pattern (3 of each); semantic labels are applied so add_vision_classifier_gate can classify each cube by color. setup_pick_place_controller with color_routing dispatches to the correct bin. An overhead camera is positioned above the pick station for vision classification. Exercises the 3-way color_routing pattern — the minimum distinguishing step beyond the 2-bin inspect/reject canonical.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-sorter-color-3lane:

1) Three-bin routing distinguishes this from the 2-bin inspect/reject template (CP-NEW-inspect-reject). color_routing dict now has 3 keys: {'red': '/World/RedBin', 'green': '/World/GreenBin', 'blue': '/World/BlueBin'}. The extra bin changes geometry constraints — three bins must fit within Franka's 0.85m reach envelope.

2) Bin geometry: bins are 0.28×0.28×0.15m placed at y=-0.45 (behind robot), equally spaced in X:
   RedBin   x=-0.40, GreenBin x=0.00, BlueBin x=+0.40.
   Maximum horizontal distance = sqrt(0.40^2 + 0.45^2) = 0.60m — inside 0.85m reach. Robot base at [0,0,0.75].

3) Conveyor in front at y=+0.40, belt top z=0.805. 9 cubes (0.06m) at z_centre=0.835, spaced 0.20m apart starting at x=-1.60. Belt speed 0.12 m/s; pick sensor at [x=0.30, y=0.40, z=0.835].

4) Cube color pattern: repeating red/green/blue × 3. Materials use OmniPBR shader_type with RGB diffuse. Semantic labels ('red cube', 'green cube', 'blue cube') enable vision classification.

5) Overhead classification camera placed at [0, 0.40, 1.30], looking at [0, 0.40, 0.835]. Used by add_vision_classifier_gate with class_labels=['red cube','green cube','blue cube'] and destination_map.

6) add_vision_classifier_gate returns cube_to_destination which feeds color_routing. In code we pass the destination_map directly so the gate builds the mapping at runtime; setup_pick_place_controller receives color_routing as the returned dict.

7) Physics: CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, MBP broadphase) for determinism on small scenes. sleepThreshold=0.0 on all cubes.

8) cuRobo plans for Franka naturally; planning_obstacles include table, conveyor, and all three bins.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism ────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Robot table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.0, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Franka arm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Mounted on table top (z=0.75); faces +Y (conveyor). Reach ~0.85m.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── Infeed conveyor (front, y=+0.40) ─────────────────────────────────────────
# Belt top z = 0.78 + 0.025 = 0.805; cube centre z = 0.805 + 0.03 = 0.835.
create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.40, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.3, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.12, 0, 0],
)

# ── Materials (OmniPBR, one per color) ───────────────────────────────────────
create_material(material_path="/World/Looks/MatRed",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.9, 0.05, 0.05])
create_material(material_path="/World/Looks/MatGreen", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.05, 0.80, 0.05])
create_material(material_path="/World/Looks/MatBlue",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.05, 0.15, 0.90])

# ── 9 cubes: 3 red, 3 green, 3 blue in repeating pattern ─────────────────────
# cube size=0.06m; centre z=0.835; spaced 0.20m apart starting at x=-1.60.
_cube_colors = ["red", "green", "blue", "red", "green", "blue", "red", "green", "blue"]
_mat_map = {"red": "/World/Looks/MatRed", "green": "/World/Looks/MatGreen", "blue": "/World/Looks/MatBlue"}
_label_map = {"red": "red cube", "green": "green cube", "blue": "blue cube"}
cube_paths = []

for i, color in enumerate(_cube_colors):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    cube_paths.append(path)
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[-1.60 + i * 0.20, 0.40, 0.835], size=0.06)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=_mat_map[color])
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=_label_map[color])
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

# ── Three destination bins (behind robot, y=-0.45) ────────────────────────────
# Equally spaced in X: RedBin x=-0.40, GreenBin x=0.00, BlueBin x=+0.40.
# Maximum horizontal reach = sqrt(0.40^2+0.45^2) = 0.60m < 0.85m Franka reach.
create_bin(prim_path="/World/RedBin",   position=[-0.40, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.28, 0.28, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/GreenBin", position=[ 0.00, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.28, 0.28, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/BlueBin",  position=[ 0.40, -0.45, 0.75], size=[0.28, 0.28, 0.15])

# ── Overhead classification camera ───────────────────────────────────────────
# Positioned above pick station, looking down at conveyor pick point.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/SortCamera", prim_type="Camera", position=[0, 0.40, 1.30])
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path="/World/SortCamera",
    target=[0, 0.40, 0.835],
    up=[0, 0, 1],
)

# ── Proximity sensor at pick station (x=0.30, y=0.40) ───────────────────────
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    position=[0.30, 0.40, 0.835],
    size=[0.07, 0.07, 0.07],
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Cube_",
)

# ── Vision classifier gate ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Classifies each cube when it enters the pick sensor; builds cube_to_destination
# mapping consumed by setup_pick_place_controller color_routing.
add_vision_classifier_gate(
    cube_paths=cube_paths,
    class_labels=["red cube", "green cube", "blue cube"],
    camera_path="/World/SortCamera",
    destination_map={
        "red cube":   "/World/RedBin",
        "green cube": "/World/GreenBin",
        "blue cube":  "/World/BlueBin",
    },
)

# ── cuRobo pick-place controller with 3-way color routing ────────────────────
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=cube_paths,
    destination_path="/World/GreenBin",
    color_routing={
        "red cube":   "/World/RedBin",
        "green cube": "/World/GreenBin",
        "blue cube":  "/World/BlueBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt",
                        "/World/RedBin", "/World/GreenBin", "/World/BlueBin"],
)
failure_modes: color_routing class_name mismatch — add_vision_classifier_gate returns class labels like 'red cube'; setup_pick_place_controller color_routing keys must EXACTLY match (space-separated 'red cube', not 'red'). Verify both dicts use the same strings.

Vision classification fails in headless mode — add_vision_classifier_gate captures viewport which requires a render context; in headless Kit, ensure --/renderer/enabled=true and --/app/window/hideUi=false, or pre-classify by querying Semantics directly.
RedBin / BlueBin out of reach if robot stiffness low — at x=±0.40, y=-0.45 the reach is 0.60m; acceptable for Franka. If using a shorter arm (UR5e 0.85m reach) ensure bins are pulled inward: x=±0.30.
Belt too fast for pick cadence — 9 cubes at 0.12 m/s × 0.20m spacing → 0.6s inter-arrival time. If cuRobo cycle time exceeds 0.6s, reduce surface_velocity to 0.08 m/s to avoid missed-pick starvation.

Three-bin conveyor layout: conveyor at y=+0.40 and bins at y=-0.45 have 0.85m center-to-center Y gap which is within Franka nominal workspace depth (0.95m). If replanning fails on BlueBin at x=+0.40, add gripper_rotation=[0,0,90] for side approach.

create_bin wall-collision artifacts — three bins at 0.28m width with 0.12m X gaps between them; if PhysX reports wall-to-wall contacts at settle reduce bin size to [0.24, 0.28, 0.15] (increases gap to 0.16m).

workpieces.note: Must be a multiple of 3 for balanced 3-class color split

code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight", intensity=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.7, 1.0, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_material(material_path="/World/Looks/MatRed",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.9, 0.05, 0.05])
create_material(material_path="/World/Looks/MatGreen", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.05, 0.80, 0.05])
create_material(material_path="/World/Looks/MatBlue",  shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.05, 0.15, 0.90])

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.06)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_path="/World/Looks/MatRed")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, class_name="red cube")
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.06)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_path="/World/Looks/MatGreen")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, class_name="green cube")
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.06)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_path="/World/Looks/MatBlue")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, class_name="blue cube")
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
set_attribute(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, attr_name="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)

create_bin(prim_path={{red_bin.path}},   position={{red_bin.position}},   size={{red_bin.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{green_bin.path}}, position={{green_bin.position}}, size={{green_bin.size}})
create_bin(prim_path={{blue_bin.path}},  position={{blue_bin.position}},  size={{blue_bin.size}})

create_prim(prim_path={{sort_camera.path}}, prim_type="Camera", position={{sort_camera.position}})
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path={{sort_camera.path}},
    target={{sort_camera.look_at}},
    up=[0, 0, 1],
)

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    position={{pick_sensor.position}},
    size={{pick_sensor.size}},
    watched_path_pattern="/World/Cube_",
)

add_vision_classifier_gate(
    cube_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    class_labels=["red cube", "green cube", "blue cube"],
    camera_path={{sort_camera.path}},
    destination_map={
        "red cube":   {{red_bin.path}},
        "green cube": {{green_bin.path}},
        "blue cube":  {{blue_bin.path}},
    },
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}],
    destination_path={{green_bin.path}},
    color_routing={
        "red cube":   {{red_bin.path}},
        "green cube": {{green_bin.path}},
        "blue cube":  {{blue_bin.path}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{red_bin.path}}, {{green_bin.path}}, {{blue_bin.path}}],
)
